title: Low Cortisol Dance
about: Low Cortisol Dance , also known as Low Cortisol Agnes Tachyon , refers to fan animation of the character Agnes Tachyon from Uma Musume: Pretty Derby dancing to the Vietnamese song "Ai Đưa Em Về" by TIA. The animation became associated with the Cortisol Level meme in early February 2026, depicting Tachyon having a low cortisol level, which inspired users to make variations of other characters doing the dance.
origin:
On January 7th, 2026, YouTube [1] user Beankong2 uploaded a fan animation of Agnes Tachyon from the video game Uma Musume: Pretty Derby dancing using Source Filmmaker . The video received more than 9,000 views in one month.

On January 24th, 2026, TikTok [2] user @gogetachiquito_oficial reposted the video, which received more than 685,000 views in one month.

On February 12th, 2026, TikTok [3] user @quandung0101 uploaded the earliest Cortisol Level edit using the animation, depicting Tachyon having low cortisol while dancing. The video received 2.8 million views in two weeks.
